measureFormulas.formula: VAR total = SUM(fact_sales[linetotal]) VAR lines = COUNT(fact_sales[salesorderdetailid]) VAR avg_val = DIVIDE(total, lines, 0) RETURN IF(total > 10000 AND avg_val > 100, "Excellent", IF(total > 5000 OR lines > 20, "Good", IF(ISBLANK(total), "No Data", "Needs Attention")))
VAR base = SUM(fact_sales[linetotal]) VAR tax = base * 0.08 VAR markup = base * 0.15 RETURN ROUND(base + tax + markup, 2)

IF(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]) > 1000, CONCATENATE("Bulk: ", ROUND(DIVIDE(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]), 1000, 0), 1), "k units"), COALESCE(IF(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]) > 0, CONCATENATE("Small: ", SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]), " units"), BLANK()), "No orders"))

VAR total = SUM(fact_sales[linetotal]) VAR max_line = MAX(fact_sales[linetotal]) VAR n_lines = COUNT(fact_sales[salesorderdetailid]) VAR pct = DIVIDE(max_line, total, 0) RETURN IF(pct > 0.5, CONCATENATE("Concentrated (", ROUND(pct * 100, 0), "% in max)"), CONCATENATE("Distributed across ", n_lines, " lines"))

IF(AVG(fact_sales[unitprice]) > 50, IF(DIVIDE(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]), COUNT(fact_sales[salesorderdetailid]), 0) < 3, "High price / Low qty", "High price / High qty"), IF(DIVIDE(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]), COUNT(fact_sales[salesorderdetailid]), 0) > 5, "Low price / High qty", "Low price / Low qty"))

VAR bike_qty = KEEP(SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]), dim_product[categoryname] = "Bikes") VAR total_qty = SUM(fact_sales[orderqty]) RETURN IF(DIVIDE(bike_qty, total_qty, 0) > 0.5, POWER(bike_qty, 0.5), bike_qty)

VAR current = SUM(fact_sales[linetotal]) VAR all_products_no_date = CLEAR(SUM(fact_sales[linetotal]), dim_product, dim_date) RETURN IF(DIVIDE(current, all_products_no_date, 0) > 0.1, CONCATENATE("Major: ", ROUND(DIVIDE(current, all_products_no_date, 0) * 100, 1), "%"), "Minor contributor")
